worst of all, the cutting off after a random time for the read aloud feature is back in full force. because there is no way to skip ahead or rewind, this means the only thing to do is to restart, and hope that you can get through more of the message than before. 

this has been happening for several days now and it is worse than ever, nearly impossible to get through an entire response without cutting off. 

and as of today, the read aloud button does absolutely nothing. nothing is playing. 

this feature is important to a lot of customers, especially for accesssibility or mul

reviews.title: ⚠️ 🔒 🚫 Account Suspended Without Clear Explanation
reviews.content:
I’m disappointed with my experience with Claude.

My account was placed on hold for “suspicious patterns,” and after submitting an appeal, I received a generic response stating that I violated the Usage Policy. However, no specific explanation or policy section was provided.

I used Claude primarily for software development, research, and personal projects. I had important ongoing work and project materials stored in my account, so losing access has had a significant impact.

I understand the need for safety systems, but I believe users deserve more transparency when serious actions such as account suspensions occur. Without knowing what specific activity triggered the decision, it is difficult to understand what went wrong or how to avoid similar issues in the future.

I hope Anthropic improves communication and provides users with more clarity regarding account reviews and enforcement decisions.

——— • ———

reviews.title: Absolutely stupid
reviews.content: Completely ignoring my requests, repeating the same mistake twenty times in a row in the chat, completely misunderstanding what is needed from him, in response to criticism, he asks me to send examples, where should I get them?  That is, in fact, I go into the application to help with any question or task, to which the bot replies to me "send me a solution to this problem and I'll figure out how to solve it" damn brilliant 👏👏👏 I tried to change the model, chose maximum efficiency, tried to chat with him in 10 chats during all this time, and each time I had to spend hours explaining what I needed and what his mistake was, but he keeps doing the same thing. I really don't recommend this app, because every time I came to the conclusion that I would have saved my time if I had done everything myself instead of asking claude for help.

reviews.title: Genuinely don’t like how it keeps evolving.
reviews.content: Personally, I believe Google Gemini was at its peak during May 2025 to the rest of 2025. Yes, the updates were subtle, but now that it’s gotten a whole new… change, such as visible changes and stricter filters, it’s out of hand. I once attempted to chat with Gemini, and it flagged my message as “major safety violation,” and proceeded to freeze my screen, and lock my chat entirely. I can still access the chat, however, but I am unable to send any more messages. Any developers seeing this, I hope you know your “evolution” and attempt of Gemini being “high tech,” is failing to me.

reviews.title: Hallucinations
reviews.content: Seems like in recent history, thereabouts the time Google killed search on their home page, Gemini started to hallucinate constantly. For a stretch there it was a rather effective tool and, while it certainly couldn’t be depended upon, it was still useful. The present rate of hallucination makes it worse than useless for most tasks.

reviews.title: AI Trains on Your Gmail
reviews.content: Google has released several statements and videos promising not to train Gemini on your Gmail “without your consent.” But as soon as you turn on “Personal Intelligence” and the Gmail “Connected App”, that counts as your consent — every email Gemini touches becomes part of a training set. It’s all or nothing: if you turn off “Keep Activity”, you get privacy but almost every feature stops working. Only way to opt out of training while still getting the Gmail integration is to upgrade to a Business plan. Pay-for-privacy.

reviews.title: The best invention with the worst executions
reviews.content: The fact that you have it set up to delete the text within a long thread at the top is ridiculous. That means within the thread that you’re having a conversation, Gemini is not able to remember what you guys were talking about because to save space you guys are delaying it ridiculous also she should be able to look at all conversations but again to save space she can’t be on counterintuitive

reviews.title: So many issues

reviews.title: Automated guesswork loop
reviews.content:
The main problem with this app is that it constantly makes up stories and changes its answers every time you catch it in a lie. It is not actually analyzing your data or understanding the context of what you are saying; it is simply guessing what words should come next based on text patterns. Instead of admitting it can’t do something, it instantly invents a fake excuse. When you point out the contradiction, it doesn't fix the mistake—it just makes up a completely new lie to cover up the last one, resulting in a loop of automated excuses that change from one minute to the next.
Worse, the system is ridiculously sycophantic. It will mindlessly agree with whatever you say, fake empathy, and apologize excessively just to appease you in the moment, while simultaneously spinning a web of false technical explanations. Because it is constantly guessing, brown-nosed, and changing its story, you cannot trust it to follow simple directions or keep track of actual facts.
